Employee.FilterPagingCount: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM Employee WHERE (@DepartmentID IS NULL OR DepartmentID = @DepartmentID) AND (@PositionID IS NULL OR PositionID = @PositionID) AND (@SalaryFrom IS NULL OR Salary >= @SalaryFrom) AND (@SalaryTo IS NULL OR Salary <= @SalaryTo) AND (@Gender IS NULL OR Gender = @Gender) AND (@HireDateFrom IS NULL OR DATE(CreatedDate) >= @HireDateFrom) AND (@HireDateTo IS NULL OR DATE(CreatedDate) <= @HireDateTo)
Employee.FilterPagingData: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE (@DepartmentID IS NULL OR DepartmentID = @DepartmentID) AND (@PositionID IS NULL OR PositionID = @PositionID) AND (@SalaryFrom IS NULL OR Salary >= @SalaryFrom) AND (@SalaryTo IS NULL OR Salary <= @SalaryTo) AND (@Gender IS NULL OR Gender = @Gender) AND (@HireDateFrom IS NULL OR DATE(CreatedDate) >= @HireDateFrom) AND (@HireDateTo IS NULL OR DATE(CreatedDate) <= @HireDateTo) ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC, EmployeeCode ASC LIMIT @PageSize OFFSET @Offset
